If there is one of the objects mentioned above on the Sun's
disc, it will cause famine; and if two or more such objects arc sight-
ed, it bodes the king's death. If, on the other hand; the objects
mentioned above have the colours, white, ted, yellow and black,
the destruction of the four classes viz. Brahmin, Ksatriya, Vaisya
and Sudra, respectively is indicated.
[White is the symbol of purity, learning and intellectual guide;
red is that of power, strength, anger etc.; yellow is the colour of
auspiciousuess and prosperity; and lastly black stands for inertia,
ignorance and sin. Similarly wind and lire are symbols of physical
